topic: Interpret and modify Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates
key_facts:
To deploy a template, use any of the following options:

 
 Azure portal 

 Azure CLI 

 PowerShell 

 REST API 

 Button in GitHub repository 

 Azure Cloud Shell 

 
 Template design

 Define templates and resource groups based on how you want to manage your solution.
For example, you can deploy your three-tier application through a single template to a single resource group.
If you envision your tiers having separate lifecycles, you can deploy your three tiers to separate resource groups.

Get support

 Here are the steps for opening a support ticket for Azure Resource Manager (ARM) template related issues:

 
 Open the Azure portal .
You can also specify in which resource group those resources are deployed.
Each Bicep file is automatically converted to an ARM template during deployment.
For example, you can deploy not only virtual machines, but also the network infrastructure, storage systems, and any other resources you need.
